title: hibbertia tricornis
intro: Hibbertia tricornis, also known as the three-cornered pea flower or yellow buttons, is a small, flowering plant native to eastern Australia and Tasmania. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia tricornis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and boost the immune system. Hibbertia tricornis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
